blocks.text: Derbi Madrileño tonight — Atlético hunt Real Madrid at the Bernabéu
Barcelona lead La Liga by 7 points over Real Madrid. Atlético sit 9 further back. Both sides need three points tonight — a draw serves absolutely no one.
🚴 Fri 11:52 — E3 Saxo Classic: Abrahamsen & Hoelgaard fly Norwegian colours on Belgian cobbles
🏎️ Fri 03:30 — Japanese GP at Suzuka, early-season F1 championship battle resumes
